code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut prev = 0
mut has_prev = false
mut sorted = true
mut i = 0
mut start = 0
mut in_token = false

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9
    if in_token
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if has_prev and v < prev
        sorted = false
      end
      prev = v
      has_prev = true
      in_token = false
    end
  else
    if not in_token
      start = i
      in_token = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_token
  let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
  let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if has_prev and v < prev
    sorted = false
  end
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
